achievements: Delivered a fully automated TypeScript entity and API generation system, restoring full IntelliSense, static type checking, and autocomplete across a complex React + Node frontend.
Significantly reduced frontend developer friction: eliminated tedious property lookups and manual endpoint verification, improving productivity and reducing runtime errors.
Introduced strongly typed include chains for related entities, removing guesswork and improving discoverability when navigating backend relationships.
Created a scalable system supporting virtual fields, optional properties, and dynamic includes, reducing bugs caused by null/undefined values.
Enabled safer and faster refactoring by mirroring backend type structures on the frontend, maintaining strong contract integrity between client and server.
Advocated for and achieved team adoption of TypeScript, transforming the codebase from fragile JavaScript patterns to a maintainable, type-safe architecture.
Built high-performance IL-based JSON generators using pooled writers and a type dictionary for endpoints, enabling rapid serialization and drastically reducing memory allocations.
Optimized backend-to-frontend data transfer by automatically generating JSON payloads for API endpoints, improving runtime efficiency and scalability of the TypeScript API system.
Leveraged advanced runtime code generation to reduce boilerplate and accelerate entity serialization while maintaining strong type safety.
responsibilities: Led the transition from JavaScript to TypeScript across the frontend codebase, improving type safety, IDE autocomplete, and developer productivity.
Developed a C# service to generate TypeScript entity classes and API clients, mirroring backend controllers and dependencies.
Implemented robust type conversion logic for backend primitives, virtual fields, and related entities to ensure accurate type mapping in TypeScript.
Built strongly typed API classes from backend controllers, including route parameter parsing, HTTP verb detection, and support for includes/relationships.
Ensured high-performance code generation by using StringBuilder, minimizing allocations, and avoiding LINQ for CPU-efficient loops.
Collaborated with frontend developers to improve IDE experience, reduce boilerplate, and enforce consistent coding conventions.
Maintained full end-to-end contract integrity between backend and frontend, enabling safer refactoring and reliable API consumption.
